name: The Hillen Group
tagline: Corporate site for a federal IT consulting firm — built from scratch
bullets: Architected and shipped the full site from a blank canvas — no templates used
Implemented static site generation via react-snap for near-instant page loads
Integrated serverless contact form via EmailJS — zero backend required
Configured GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline for automated production deployments
Achieved 95+ Lighthouse scores across performance, accessibility, and SEO

name: CarFolio
tagline: Full-stack vehicle maintenance tracker — web and mobile in a shared monorepo
bullets: CarFolio is a vehicle management app that keeps all your cars, trucks, and SUVs organized in one place
Add your vehicles and CarFolio reminds you when registration renewals and emissions inspections are coming due
Log every oil change, tire rotation, and repair — so you always know what's been done and what's next
Available on the web and as a mobile app, so your vehicle records are always in your pocket
Designed for everyday drivers and multi-vehicle households who are tired of losing track of paperwork

name: MedicalMeasures
tagline: Role-based healthcare quality management SPA for tracking HEDIS measures and care gaps
bullets: Built five distinct role-based dashboards (Admin, Quality Analyst, Provider, Auditor, Abstractor) with route-guarded access per role
Implemented HEDIS measure tracking with domain performance bar charts and status distribution doughnut charts benchmarked against a 75% threshold
Designed care gap management with prioritized gap lists, member assignment, and open/in-progress/resolved status tracking
Built a clinical abstraction workflow queue with audit trail entries and multi-stage status tracking per member and measure
Supported CSV import for member rosters and care gap data with lazy-loaded feature modules for optimized performance
